CustomField.description: Hyperlink to the associated document (ref to the table above)
CustomField.formula:
CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) ,'MR Invoice', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c ), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.Name), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.Name)) ,'MR Invoice Reconciliation',HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.Name) ,'MR Invoice Overpayment Credit',HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Issuance__c,leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Name__c) ,'MR Cash Payment',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.Name), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment__r.Name)) ,'MR Payment Credit Applied',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.Name), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment__r.Name)) ,'MR Invoice Credit (Adjustment)',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.Name), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment__r.Name)) ,'MR Payment Offset',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.Name), HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment__r.Name)) ,'Adjustment', HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Adjustment__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Adjustment_Name__c) ,'MR Transfer', HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer__c,leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer_Name__c) ,'MR Accrued', HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.Name) ,'MR Claim Accrued', HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Claim__c,leaseworks__Claim__r.Name) ,'MR Invoice Adjustment',HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment__r.Name) ,IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable_Line_Item__c),HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Payable_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.Name),IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payout_Line_Item__c),HYPERLINK('/'+leaseworks__Payout_Line_Item__c,leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.Name),'')))
/** The below transaction types are handled in the else of the case statement 'MR Contribution Applied',HYPERLINK('/'+Payable_Line_Item__c,Event_Payable__r.Name) 'MR Contribution Used',HYPERLINK('/'+Payable_Line_Item__c,Event_Payable__r.Name) 'MR Claim',HYPERLINK('/'+Payable_Line_Item__c,Event_Payable__r.Name) 'MR Claim Refund',HYPERLINK('/'+Payout_Line_Item__c,Event_Payout__r.Name) 'MR Claim Offset',HYPERLINK('/'+Payout_Line_Item__c,Event_Payout__r.Name) 'MR Rebate',HYPERLINK('/'+Payable_Line_Item__c,Event_Payable__r.Name) 'MR Rebate Payout',HYPERLINK('/'+Payout_Line_Item__c,Event_Payout__r.Name) 'MR Manual Payable',HYPERLINK('/'+Payable_Line_Item__c,Event_Payable__r.Name) 'MR Manual Payout',HYPERLINK('/'+Payout_Line_Item__c,Event_Payout__r.Name) 'Payable - MR Reconciliation',HYPERLINK('/'+Payable_Line_Item__c,Event_Payable__r.Name) 'Payout - MR Reconciliation',HYPERLINK('/'+Payout_Line_Item__c,Event_Payout__r.Name) **/
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing the source document number and hyperlink to the document
CustomField.label: Document Number
